errors.server: Internal server error. Please try again.
errors.session: Invalid session. Please sign in again.
errors.unauthenticated: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
errors.resetLinkInvalid: The recovery link is invalid or has expired.
errors.useGoogle: This account uses Sign in with Google. Use the Google button to sign in.
errors.googleNoPassword: This account uses Sign in with Google — there is no local password to change.
errors.googleNotConfigured: Sign in with Google is not configured on the server.
errors.verifyLinkInvalid: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired.
errors.verifyResendThrottled: We've already sent several emails. Try again in an hour.
errors.verifyDemo: Demo accounts have no email to confirm.
errors.googleLinkUnverified: An unconfirmed account already exists for this email. Open the confirmation link we sent and try again.
errors.pinBeforeBiometrics: Set a PIN before turning on biometrics.
errors.registrationExpired: The registration session expired. Please try again.
errors.householdAlreadyMember: You already belong to a household.
errors.householdNotMember: You don't belong to a household.
errors.inviteExpired: The invite is invalid or has expired.
errors.inviteTooMany: Too many unused invites. Wait for them to expire.
errors.householdVerifyEmail: Confirm your email before sharing the household.
errors.householdDemo: Demo accounts cannot create a household.
errors.bankNotConfigured: Bank sync is not configured on the server.
errors.bankLinkFailed: Failed to create the bank connection. Please try again.
errors.bankConfirmFailed: Failed to confirm the bank connection. Please try again.
errors.bankNoneLinked: No bank linked yet. Authorise it on your bank’s site first.
errors.syncCooldown: Just synced — wait a few seconds.
errors.integrationNotConfigured: Integration not configured on the server.
errors.pushNotConfigured: Notifications are not configured on the server.
errors.loanSettled: The loan is already paid off.
errors.contactIncomplete: Fill in your name, a valid email and a message.
errors.contactThrottled: Too many messages — please try again later.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

lock.title: App locked
lock.subtitle: Hi {{name}}. Enter your PIN to continue.
